properties.name: Littlebridge Farm Fresh Ltd
properties.description: A local farm favorite known for fresh produce and a friendly atmosphere.

properties.name: Grangewater open farm
properties.description: A great open farm experience where kids can get up close with various farm animals.

properties.name: Tannaghmore Gardens & Animal Farm
properties.description: Features rare breeds of farm animals, beautiful gardens, and a large playpark.

properties.name: Fermanagh Fun Farm
properties.description: A fantastic day out with animal feeding, indoor play, and tractor rides.

properties.name: Fort Evergreen Warrenpoint
properties.description: Combines an animal farm with a brilliant fort-themed play area and petting zoo.

properties.name: Mountpanther Farm Park

properties.name: WWT Castle Espie

properties.name: Rosepark Farm
properties.description: A family-run farm with a great inland beach, petting area, and beautiful walkways.

properties.name: Streamvale Farm

properties.name: Glenpark Estate
properties.description: A beautiful estate featuring rare breed animals and a lovely woodland setting.
